analysis_name: Root Directory Validation - Enterprise Best Practices

.git/.rationale: Git repository metadata - MUST remain in root for Git functionality

node_modules/.issue: Should be inside the frontend project, not in root
node_modules/.rationale: npm dependencies belong with their respective project
node_modules/.enterprise_practice: Dependencies should be co-located with their consuming project

bin/.issue: Build artifacts should not be in root - can be regenerated
bin/.proper_location: Build artifacts should be in .gitignore and regenerated
bin/.rationale: Build outputs are temporary and project-specific
bin/.enterprise_practice: Build artifacts excluded from source control

obj/.issue: Intermediate files should not be in root - can be regenerated
obj/.rationale: Intermediate files are temporary compiler artifacts
obj/.enterprise_practice: obj/ folders excluded from source control

project-management/.issue: This should be inside docs/ structure

agents/.rationale: More descriptive and indicates automation/tooling purpose
agents/.action: rename to automation/ and organize sub-structure

deployment/.action: keep name, ensure sub-structure is logical

legacy/.action: keep name, ensure proper archival structure

tests/.rationale: Both singular and plural are common
tests/.enterprise_practice: Either tests/ or test/ widely accepted

root_directory_principles: Root should contain only essential files and top-level organizational directories
Build artifacts (bin/, obj/) should never be in root or source control
Dependencies should be co-located with their consuming projects
Documentation should be centralized under docs/
Directory names should be clear and follow industry standards

proposed_operations.description: Move npm dependencies to frontend project where they belong
Archive build outputs and add to .gitignore
Archive intermediate files and add to .gitignore
Merge standalone project-management into docs structure
Rename to more descriptive and enterprise-appropriate name
Add bin/, obj/, and node_modules patterns to .gitignore

validation_criteria.enterprise_compliance: All directories have clear, professional names
validation_criteria.build_artifact_policy: Zero build artifacts in source control
